title: please add discussions in dashboards

posts.author: timuzeic (Timothy Diputado)
posts.cookedHtml:
discussions are helpful notes in boards level and items level, even in subitems.

is there a way that we can also apply discussions in dashboard/chart level and even in individual widget discussions is better. thankyou

so that we would be able to leave a note about what the widget is all about or what the dashboard is for

thanyouuu
